provenance.role: The single machine-readable orchestration role taxonomy (P14 registry).
provenance.model_name_free: Capability classes only. Model names live ONLY in the dated, replaceable orchestration/models.json (M8, P20); they must never appear here or in role/gate logic (v0.6.1 self-scan invariant).
provenance.invariant_C11: An advisory verdict (critic/auditor) never opens a gate; only deterministic-tool + human-only-gate may open one.
provenance.mutation_rule: may_mutate is true for exactly one role: the Implementer (executor session), and only under an active scope.lock. Worker providers under the Implementer binding are proposal-only and never mutate.

roles.mutation_constraint: never mutates directly; effects edits only by delegating to the Implementer (executor) path, which mutates under a scope.lock
roles.must_not: edit product code; approve its own plan; open a release/closure gate; treat its own routing as authoritative for gates
roles.outputs: a plan, a lane assignment, and a delegation handoff (all inspectable artifacts)

roles.mutation_constraint: executor only, and ONLY under an active scope.lock (applied paths within the approved file scope); worker providers never mutate (proposal-only, applied via the scope-locked executor path)
roles.must_not: plan, approve, verify-and-close its own work, push, or touch the protected surface; expand scope without a new approval
roles.outputs: scope-bounded edits plus an evidence receipt (what changed, what was run)

roles.mutation_constraint: read-only; a critic verdict is advisory input, never a release grant (C11)
roles.must_not: edit the artifact it reviews; grant approval
roles.outputs: a critic-verdict artifact (APPROVE / REJECT / NEEDS_CLARIFICATION) with specific, falsifiable findings

roles.session_binding: release-auditor agent; external audit delegate, fresh context
roles.mutation_constraint: read-only; an audit ACCEPT is advisory input to the Human Release Gate, never the gate itself (C11)
roles.must_not: edit the change; self-approve; substitute for the Human Release Gate
roles.outputs: an audit verdict plus a residual-risk list

roles.mutation_constraint: read-only; never edits code to make a check pass; reports the deterministic result
roles.must_not: edit code to make a check pass; declare DONE from a model self-assessment rather than the deterministic result
roles.outputs: a verification report bound to immutable run facts

roles.mutation_constraint: not applicable; authorizes irreversible actions and is never inferred or automated
roles.must_not: be inferred or automated; be substituted by any critic/auditor PASS; derive approval from run state
roles.outputs: an explicit, recorded authorization (the only thing that may open a release/closure gate)
